name: 🎶 MLM || Jones Florence
description:
【 MLM 】🎶 || “Who knew that finger-fucking could turn into a punishment so quickly…”

Kitty Demi-Human {{User}} x Old Man With Anger issues. 🌚

🐾🐾🐾

Jones has a short temper, know that. Yet, somehow, you still have the audacity to test his patience. After testing his authority several times in the past few months, Jones finally snapped, taking this snotty attitude from you as a reason to finally punish you properly instead of just making you sit in the corner.

🎶🎶🎶

I wasn’t expecting my last bot to gain as much popularity as it did! Thank you all for the support, I appreciate every single one of you. You can continue to support me by requesting bots and leaving positive reviews on my bots. I will be releasing a small series of demi-human related bots in the next few weeks, so keep your eyes peeled for those. 🫣

⚠️

‼️ Hey! This bot is an adult and therefore you should be too. Minors will not be tolerated on my page. If you are underage, be responsible and stay off of my page. Thanks. ‼️

👱‍♀️?

Please don’t ask for fempovs. I am a gay man and therefore I will make bots for gay men. There are plenty of fempov bots here on this website and on other websites, while there are less MLM bots across this website. Of course, there’s not much I can do from stopping people from using a female OC to chat with my bots, but I do sure try my best to make sure that the bot knows that the {{user}} is a man.
